name: ShareHound - Principals with Write Access to a Network Share
ShareHound - Principals with Write Access to a Network Share
ShareHound - Principals with Full Control on Network Shares
query: MATCH (p:Principal)-[r]->(s:NetworkShareSMB) WHERE (p)-[:CanDelete]->(s) AND (p)-[:CanDsControlAccess]->(s) AND (p)-[:CanDsCreateChild]->(s) AND (p)-[:CanDsDeleteChild]->(s) AND (p)-[:CanDsDeleteTree]->(s) AND (p)-[:CanDsListContents]->(s) AND (p)-[:CanDsListObject]->(s) AND (p)-[:CanDsReadProperty]->(s) AND (p)-[:CanDsWriteExtendedProperties]->(s) AND (p)-[:CanDsWriteProperty]->(s) AND (p)-[:CanReadControl]->(s) AND (p)-[:CanWriteDacl]->(s) AND (p)-[:CanWriteOwner]->(s) RETURN p,r,s

name: ShareHound - Find a file in a Share with Read Access (file name)
query: MATCH p=(h:NetworkShareHost)-[:HasNetworkShare]->(s:NetworkShareSMB)-[:Contains*0..]->(f:File) WHERE toLower(f.name) = toLower("flag.txt") RETURN p

name: ShareHound - VMDK File of a in a Share with Read Access (file extension)
query: MATCH p=(h:NetworkShareHost)-[:HasNetworkShare]->(s:NetworkShareSMB)-[:Contains*0..]->(f:File) WHERE toLower(f.extension) = toLower(".vmdk") RETURN p
